pi_items.source: Task description, export_result.sh, and verifier.py explicit checks
Task description, export_result.sh, and verifier.py explicit checks
Running python validation against inline CSV in setup_task.sh with logic defined in task description

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically constructed subset of the NASA Meteorite Landings dataset injected via setup_task.sh. The expected output Python script path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/generate_kml.py, and the expected generated KML file is /home/ga/Documents/massive_meteorites.kml. Based on the filtering criteria (mass >= 100000g, year >= 1970, valid coordinates), the exact expected matching meteorites are strictly limited to Jilin, Chelyabinsk, and Mbale, which matches the required metadata claims and verifier logic.
